title: leonurus comosus
intro: Leonurus comosus, also known as Motherwort, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to Europe and Asia, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to calm the nervous system, reduce anxiety and stress, and act as a uterine tonic. The health benefits of Motherwort include relief from menstrual cramps, menopausal symptoms, and insomnia, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Motherwort is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal supplements and capsule forms.
